---
title: "About Me"
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/gsap.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/ScrollTrigger.min.js"></script>

<div class="about-page">

  <div class="about-hero">
    <div class="about-hero-photo">
      <img src="../assets/Merna.png" alt="Merna Saad" />
    </div>
    <h1 class="about-name">Merna Saad</h1>
    <p class="about-sub">MSBA, UCSD Rady 2026</p>
    <p class="about-tagline" id="about-tagline"></p>
    <div class="about-badge">Open to Work</div>
    <div class="about-links">
      <a href="mailto:msaad@ucsd.edu" class="about-link-btn about-link-filled">Email</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/merna-s-saad" class="about-link-btn">LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/merna-saad" class="about-link-btn">GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/messaging/compose/?to=merna-s-saad" class="about-link-btn about-link-brass">Message Me</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="about-story-section">
    <h2 class="about-story-title">My Story</h2>
    <div class="about-story-container" id="about-story">
      <img src="../assets/about-story.png" alt="Merna Saad career story: from dual degree at AUC through banking at Corplease and Bank of Egypt to MSBA at UCSD Rady, building AI agents, and looking for analytics roles" class="about-story-img" />
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="about-cta-section">
    <p class="about-cta-text">Interested in working together?</p>
    <div class="about-cta-buttons">
      <a href="mailto:msaad@ucsd.edu" class="about-link-btn about-link-filled">Get in Touch</a>
      <a href="../projects/" class="about-link-btn">View My Projects</a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
(function() {
  if (typeof gsap === 'undefined') return;
  gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);

  // Typing tagline
  var tagline = 'Engineering mindset. Strategic vision. Data driven.';
  var el = document.getElementById('about-tagline');
  if (el) {
    var i = 0;
    function typeIt() {
      if (i < tagline.length) { el.textContent += tagline.charAt(i); i++; setTimeout(typeIt, 40); }
    }
    setTimeout(typeIt, 400);
  }

  // Hero entrance
  gsap.fromTo('.about-hero-photo', { scale: 0.8, opacity: 0 }, { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.7, ease: 'back.out(1.3)' });
  gsap.fromTo('.about-name', { y: 30, opacity: 0 }, { y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.8, ease: 'power3.out' });
  gsap.fromTo('.about-sub', { y: 20, opacity: 0 }, { y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power3.out', delay: 0.2 });
  gsap.fromTo('.about-badge', { scale: 0, opacity: 0 }, { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.5, ease: 'back.out(1.4)', delay: 0.6 });
  gsap.fromTo('.about-links', { y: 20, opacity: 0 }, { y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power3.out', delay: 0.8 });

  // Story image fade in
  var storyImg = document.querySelector('.about-story-img');
  if (storyImg) {
    gsap.fromTo(storyImg,
      { opacity: 0, y: 20 },
      { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.8, ease: 'power3.out',
        scrollTrigger: { trigger: storyImg, start: 'top 80%', once: true }
      }
    );
  }

  // Story title
  gsap.fromTo('.about-story-title',
    { y: 20, opacity: 0 },
    { y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.7, ease: 'power3.out',
      scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.about-story-title', start: 'top 85%', once: true }
    }
  );

  // Bottom CTA
  gsap.fromTo('.about-cta-section',
    { y: 30, opacity: 0 },
    { y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.7, ease: 'power3.out',
      scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.about-cta-section', start: 'top 85%', once: true }
    }
  );
})();
</script>
```
